top_signals.title: How the ‘double scar’ of past inflation woes and geopolitical shocks amid the Iran war is hitting consumers
top_signals.summary: Mental "scars" reinforce fears of stagflation, when rising prices coincide with declining growth, research finds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: European defense stocks are cooling off after the military spending boom. Here's what's next
top_signals.summary: Analysts see 2026 as a period of consolidation for the sector, as excitement over Europe's increased defense budget is replaced by company-specific drivers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU seeks to 'intensify' talks with U.S. on advanced cyber AI models, official tells CNBC, amid Mythos concerns
top_signals.summary: Anthropic's Mythos model, which has advanced cyber abilities, has prompted a wave of concern from governments and businesses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump administration wants to raise North American auto content to 82%, with half from U.S.
top_signals.summary: The proposed new thresholds were revealed to automakers during two days of bilateral talks to revise the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement on trade that concluded on ‌Friday.
